title: No Iron Golems Spawn
description:
Disables the spawning of iron golems caused by villagers, spawn eggs, or commands. 
Iron golems can only be spawned by building them manually.
body:
# Disable Villager Golem Spawns Mod
This Fabric mod disables the spawning of iron golems caused by villagers, spawn eggs, or commands. This can especially be helpful when building a city and you want to prevent unwanted golem spawns.

**Iron golems can only be spawned by building them manually.**
## Features
- Prevents iron golems from being spawned by villagers, spawn eggs, or commands. Can only be spawned by building them manually.
- Adds the 
```/golemcount``` command (available from version 1.0.1-1.21.4) for server operators to track how many villager-spawned golems have been prevented. Requires OP level 2 or higher.

## Requirements
- This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to work. 
- This is a server-side mod only. Players connecting to a server with this mod do not need it installed on their client.
